content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Elephant". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/617/A
content.inputFormat: The input consists of a single integer x, representing the distance to the target.
content.outputFormat: The output should be the minimum number of steps required to reach the target.

solution.approach: The problem can be solved by using the formula 5 * (x / 5) if x is divisible by 5, otherwise 5 * ((x / 5) + 1).
